heading: Omitted]
label: 4063 to 4065 Omitted]
notes: CodificationAs enacted, , , , originally transferred sections 2361a, 2358b, and 2374a of this title to sections 4063 to 4065, respectively, to become effective . Subsequently, , (u)(3)(B), , , 2152, amended , effective as if included therein, so as to eliminate those transfers, thereby omitting these sections before they took effect. Other amendments by resulted in transfers of sections 2361a, 2358b, and 2374a to sections 4142, 1766, and 4025 of this title, respectively.Pub. L. 116–283, div.
